courseTitle: Business, Ethics, Accessibility, and Player Research
title: Accessibility-First Game
genericDescription: Design accessibility from the beginning; prioritize features for a specific access need; test with representative constraints.
specificDescription: Build a game designed around one primary accessibility goal such as low vision, Deaf or hard-of-hearing play, motor accessibility, cognitive load, photosensitivity, or low literacy. Include a feature checklist.
gradingRubric: 30 pts accessibility-first design; 20 pts implementation quality; 20 pts playability; 15 pts checklist and testing; 15 pts reflection.
